items.title: Argentina vs Switzerland LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal
items.summary: Live coverage and updates from our text commentary stream as Messi's Argentina face Switzerland in the quarterfinals.

items.title: Vietnam tragedy: 15 Indian tourists killed as boat capsizes near Phu Quoc
items.summary: Fifteen Indian tourists died and seventeen were injured when a speedboat capsized near Vietnam's Phu Quoc island. The vessel was carrying mobile phone dealers from Andhra Prades...

items.title: Palestinian aid worker who organized World Cup screenings killed in Israeli strike
items.summary: Palestinians are mourning Mohammed al-Wahidi, a beloved aid worker in Gaza. He was killed by as Israeli airstrike while en route to a World Cup screening which he organized.
